question: In the provided image, what is the position of the wooden bed frame relative to the white sheets? Select from the following options: (A) The bed frame is inside the sheets.. (B) The bed frame is outside the sheets.. (C) The bed frame is overlapping with the sheets.. (D) The bed frame is perpendicular to the sheets..
gold_answer: The bed frame is outside the sheets
answer_choices: The bed frame is inside the sheets
The bed frame is outside the sheets
The bed frame is overlapping with the sheets
The bed frame is perpendicular to the sheets
inpaint_prompt: Fill the masked region naturally, removing whatever objects appear there. Preserve the rest of the image exactly.
